series_metadata.series_title: Standard Field Sobriety Testing (SFST) Training Applications
series_metadata.series_description: The SFST training alcohol request form (OHP 0004)and Release of Spiritous Liquor For Training form (OHP 0005) are utilized to document the release of alcohol and spiritous liquor to law enforcement agencies for training related to law enforcement agencies.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain current, plus one year. May be destroyed immediately if transferred to electronic copy. ; Electronic: Retain current, plus one year., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Erase
